brief_description: Premium wireless over-ear headphones featuring industry-leading active noise cancellation, smart listening technology, and Bluetooth multipoint connection.

quick_start.title: Power On & Pairing
quick_start.description: Press and hold the POWER button on the left ear cup for approx. 2 seconds. The indicator will flash blue, and it automatically enters pairing mode on first boot. Select 'WH-1000XM4' in your Bluetooth settings.

quick_start.title: Touch Control Gestures
quick_start.description: The surface of the right ear cup is a touch panel. Double-tap to play/pause or answer calls; swipe forward/backward to skip tracks; swipe up/down to adjust volume.

quick_start.title: Quick Attention Mode
quick_start.description: When someone speaks to you, cover the entire right ear cup with your hand. The headphones will instantly reduce music volume and let in ambient voices. Release to resume ANC.

quick_start.title: Download App for Optimization
quick_start.description: Download the 'Sony Headphones Connect' app on your phone to set up personalized noise cancellation, adjust EQ settings, configure multipoint connections, and update firmware.

features.title: Active Noise Canceling & Personal NC Optimizer
features.description: Industry-leading active noise canceling that analyzes personal characteristics (glasses, hair, head size) and atmospheric pressure to customize the sound performance.
operation_steps: Put on the headphones, then press and hold the CUSTOM button on the left cup until you hear optimization tones.
Alternatively, open the Headphones Connect app and start the NC Optimizer.
Press the CUSTOM button briefly to cycle through Noise Canceling, Ambient Sound, and Off.
precautions: Keep still during optimization and do not remove the headphones. Tones might sound loud.
Atmospheric pressure changes during flight. Re-run optimization after reaching cruising altitude.
features.support_info: If noise cancellation feels weak, check that the ear pads seal properly or re-run the NC Optimizer in the app.

features.title: Speak-to-Chat Smart Ambient control
features.description: As soon as you speak, the headphones automatically pause your music and let ambient sound in, letting you conduct a conversation without taking them off.
operation_steps: Tap and hold the right touch sensor panel with two fingers until you hear 'Speak-to-chat activated' to enable it.
Talk to automatically pause playback. Music will resume 15 seconds after your conversation ends.
Double-tap the right touch panel to manually resume music immediately.
precautions: Speak-to-chat may trigger when you cough, hum, or brush teeth. Reduce sensitivity to 'L (Low)' in the app if needed.
The feature only detects the wearer's voice, not voices from other speakers nearby.
features.support_info: If the feature does not trigger, ensure Speak-to-Chat is toggled ON in the Sony Headphones Connect App.

features.title: Bluetooth Multipoint Connection
features.description: Allows pairing and connecting to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously, automatically switching to the active ringing device.
operation_steps: Enable 'Connect to 2 devices simultaneously' in the Headphones Connect app.
Pair device A, then pair device B. The headphones will manage connections automatically.
To switch playback, pause device A and play on device B.
precautions: LDAC audio codec is disabled when multipoint connection is turned on.
Incoming calls on either connected device will automatically route to the headphones.
features.support_info: If one device fails to connect, turn off Bluetooth on both devices, restart the headphones, and reconnect them sequentially.

faults.symptom: Headphones fail to turn on or charge indicator flashes red
faults.cause: Abnormal battery charging temperature or completely drained battery.
faults.solution:
1. Charge the headphones using the supplied USB Type-C cable in a cool environment (5°C - 35°C).
2. If the light flashes red, disconnect, let cool for 15 minutes, and try another USB port.

faults.symptom: Frequent Bluetooth audio dropouts or sound stuttering
faults.cause: Wireless signal interference or high-bitrate LDAC connection congestion.
faults.solution:
1. Open the app and change 'Connection Quality' from 'Priority on Sound Quality' to 'Priority on Stable Connection'.
2. Move away from active Wi-Fi routers, microwaves, or other 2.4GHz wireless devices.

faults.symptom: No sound from one side or touchpad doesn't respond
faults.solution:
1. Reset the headphones: Connect to a USB charging port, then press both the POWER and CUSTOM buttons simultaneously.
2. If resetting fails, initialize: Turn off USB, then hold POWER and CUSTOM for 7 seconds until indicator flashes blue 4 times.
